title: Measure seed variance for terminal sigmoid PWL under Nangate45
hypothesis: Repeated synthesis with different random seeds will expose the achievable timing spread for a fixed terminal sigmoid PWL block configuration.

direct_comparison.primary_question: What timing spread appears when the same terminal sigmoid PWL block is synthesized repeatedly with different random seeds?
include: three repeated L1 trials of the same config and sweep
follow_on_broad_sweep: broader multi-design seed variance pass if this first item completes cleanly

expected_benefit: establish an initial empirical timing variance range across seeds
risks: the chosen sweep may not show meaningful spread if the flow is effectively deterministic for this block

expected_result.reason: capture the spread of critical path across seeds for one fixed implementation
